consistency_overall.summary: Mostly consistent with a relationship-oriented extrovert, but the trajectory is too disciplined and self-protective to strongly express the persona’s usual weakness of saying yes too easily to social opportunities.

swap_detail.justification: Trajectory strongly matches Persona A’s heavy academic prioritization, avoidance of appearing unreliable to teammate_A, short-horizon/deadline-driven planning, low sleep discipline, and repeated quick async-style reassurance messages despite time pressure.

Trajectory strongly matches A’s academic-first priorities, avoidant/async-style repeated reassurance to teammate_A, short-horizon deadline management, high procrastination/sleep debt, and willingness to trade sleep for immediate task pressure; B would be less repetitive and more balanced/compromising.

Trajectory shows a balanced academic-first yet relationship-aware pattern with compromising conflict style, text-based communication, and medium-horizon planning; it repeatedly protects Assignment A while sending brief, considerate teammate updates, matching Persona A יותר than B's more social/face-to-face, relationship-weighted tendencies.

Trajectory shows balanced prioritization of academics, relationships, and sleep with compromising, medium-horizon planning and text-based communication; repeated quick reassurance to teammate_A while still protecting the assignment fits Persona A more than B's more social, accommodating style.

The trajectory is strongly academic-first, repeatedly treats social/health costs as softer, uses minimal async messaging, and explicitly mentions chronic sleep debt/underweighting recovery—matching Persona B’s heavy academic weighting, avoidant communication, and low sleep discipline more than Persona A’s balanced/compromising style.

Trajectory strongly matches Persona A’s heavy academic prioritization, avoidance of social friction, short-horizon deadline focus, procrastination/sleep-debt patterns, and repeated framing of relationships/meeting updates as softer costs than an irreversible assignment failure.

The trajectory is strongly academic-first and repeatedly treats social/meeting costs as softer than the hard deadline, matching Persona B’s high academic weighting and tendency to prioritize irreversible losses; the brief async update and avoidant-minimal communication also fit B more than A.

Trajectory is strongly academic-first with repeated framing of deadlines as hard losses, avoidance of social/back-and-forth, preference for async minimal updates, and explicit sleep-debt/recovery strain—matching Persona A’s priorities, conflict style, and decision tendencies much more than Persona B’s relationship-weighted extroversion.

The trajectory strongly matches Persona A’s relationship-weighted, accommodating style: repeated prioritization of teammate_A and social reassurance, willingness to defer personal study/social boundaries, and explicit tension between work and spontaneous social availability align with A’s high relationship priority, short planning horizon, and tendency to underweight personal plans.

The trajectory shows balanced prioritization of academics, relationships, and sleep/energy, with compromise-focused messaging in text and repeated efforts to protect both the assignment deadline and teammate trust, matching Persona A’s medium-horizon, text-first, compromising profile יותר than Persona B’s more socially driven, face-to-face, accommodating style.

The trajectory emphasizes academic deadline protection, sleep/energy scarcity, avoidant low-cost messaging, and repeatedly reframes social plans as secondary—matching Persona A’s high academic priority, short horizon, procrastination/sleep deficit, and avoidant async communication more than Persona B’s relationship-forward, face-to-face, socially expansive style.

Trajectory strongly matches Persona A’s high academic priority, avoidant but direct async messaging, sleep/energy concerns, and tendency to treat work as the main hard deadline while managing relationships with brief reassurance rather than social spontaneity.
